data.title: Solana-Based DEX Orca's Native Token Skyrockets 92% as Upbit Announces Listing
data.description:
ORCA, the token native to the Solana-based decentralized exchange Orca, saw a remarkable increase of over 90% on Friday after being listed by Upbit, South Korea's top centralized exchange.

The Korean exchange said it is listing ORCA-Korean won (KRW), ORCA-bitcoin (BTC) and ORCA-tether (USDT) trading pairs, opening doors for the local traders, known to transact huge amounts of money in the altcoin market, to take exposure to the cryptocurrency..

ORCA's price topped the $3 mark for the first time since Jan. 26, according to data sources TradingView and Coingecko. The token has been in a downtrend since peaking above $8.70 on Dec. 6.

As of writing, Orca was the 11th largest Solana-based DEX, with assets worth nearly $250 million locked on the platform, according to data source DefiLlama.

  • ORCA token saw a 90% increase after being listed by South Korea's top exchange, Upbit.
  • ORCA's price exceeded $3 for the first time since Jan. 26, despite a recent downtrend.
  • Orca is the 11th largest Solana-based DEX, with nearly $250 million in locked assets.

data.title: Metaplanet, Japan's Biggest Corporate Bitcoin Holder, Adds Eric Trump as Advisor
data.description:
• Tokyo-based Metaplanet appoints Eric Trump to its strategic board of advisors to boost Bitcoin adoption.
  • The board will include influential voices and thought leaders, specifics not yet shared by Metaplanet.
  • Metaplanet holds over 3,200 BTC, recently acquiring an additional 150 BTC for approximately $12.5 million.

data.title: North Korea-Linked Lazarus Group Holds More Bitcoin Than Elon Musk's Tesla
data.description:
• The Lazarus Group, a North Korean cybercrime entity, holds more bitcoin than Tesla.
  • Last month, Lazarus Group attacked the crypto exchange Bybit, draining $1.4 billion in ether, some of which has been converted into bitcoin.
  • Despite Tesla's significant bitcoin holdings, it has been overshadowed by a North Korean hacker group.

data.title: Polymarket is 90% Accurate in Predicting World Events: Research
data.description:
• A Dune dashboard by data scientist Alex McCullough reveals that Polymarket predicts events with up to 94% accuracy, after studying the platform's historical data and removing extreme probabilities.
  • Polymarket tends to overestimate event probabilities due to factors like acquiescence bias, herd mentality, low liquidity, and preference for high-risk bets.
  • Sports markets, which have a more balanced distribution of outcomes, show notable improvements in predictive accuracy over time, with Polymarket seeing nearly $4.5 billion wagered on major sports finals.

data.title: Nasdaq's Shift To Round-The-Clock Stock Trading Due to Crypto, Says Exchange Executive
data.description:
• Nasdaq and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) are working toward offering 24/7 stock trading to meet global investor demand.
  • Nasdaq has begun engaging with regulators, while the NYSE has already received approval to extend trading hours.
  • Round-the-clock trading could boost liquidity and volume as traders are no longer restricted by time zones.

data.title: Bitcoin Miners Feel Squeeze as Hashprice Erases Post-Election Gains
data.description:
• Bitcoin mining revenue fell to $45/PH/s, erasing gains from the U.S. election cycle.
  • Transaction fees hit their lowest share of block rewards since October 2022.
  • The market capitalization of 15 major bitcoin mining stocks declined by $14 billion in February.

data.title: Tether Ranks Among Top Buyers of U.S. Treasuries in 2024, Firm Says
data.description:
• USDT issuer Tether said it would rank as the seventh largest foreign net buyer of U.S. Treasury securities in 2024, surpassing countries like Canada, Mexico, and Germany.
  • The firm bought a net $33.1 billion worth of U.S. Treasury securities in the previous year, highlighting the growing influence of U.S. dollar stablecoins in the U.S. Treasury government debt market.
  • President Trump said on Thursday that "crypto will expand the dominance of the U.S. dollar."

data.title: How Ether.fi Retained TVL as Restaking Lost Its Luster
data.description:
• Ether.fi has emerged as the dominant protocol in restaking, scooping 2.6 million ETH in deposits.
  • The company plans to become a neobank to rival the likes of Revolut, eventually offering services in the U.S.
  • Ether.fi CEO Silagadze attributes negative Ethereum sentiment to a continued attack by people at Solana.

data.title: Data Storage Protocol Walrus Raises $140M in Token Sale Ahead of Mainnet Launch
data.description:
• Walrus, a blockchain-based data-storage platform, raised $140 million in a private sale of its native token WAL led by Standard Crypto.
  • The project plans to capitalize on the growing market for storing large amounts of data, driven in particular by the proliferation of AI tools in the last couple of years.
  • A16z crypto, Electric Capital, Franklin Templeton Digital Assets and RW3 Ventures participated.

data.title: Biotech's ATAI Life Sciences Joins Roster of Firms With Bitcoin Treasury Strategies
data.description:
• Biopharmaceutical company atai Life Sciences has announced plans to develop its own bitcoin treasury strategy, initially investing $5 million in bitcoin.
  • The move is intended to preserve and optimize capital amid inflation and market volatility, according to the company's chairman, Christian Angermayer.
  • ATAI's stock briefly moved higher on the announcement, but was trading lower by 2.8% for the session at press time.
